home.heroSubtitle: AI keenya seenaa du'a keessan qora, dadhabbii mul'isa, erga ga'aa hojii abjuu argachuuf gargaarsa ta'e kenna.
home.keyFeaturesSubtitle: Teeknooloojiin keenya seenaa du'a keessan hunda qora, fooyyessi irratti mul'isuuf gargaara.
home.aiPoweredDesc: AI keenya seenaa du'a keessan qora, yaada guutuu qabiyyee, ijaarsa fi saalaa kenna.
home.atsDesc: Seenaa du'a keessan sirna qorannoo filannoo irraa gahuuf teessoo kenna.
home.actionableDesc: Seenaa du'a keessan cimsuuf fi gaaffii ga'aa dabalatuuf yaada adeemsa kenna.
home.threeStepsSubtitle: Seenaa du'a keessan fooyyessuuf fi gaaffii dabalatu argachuuf salphaa goona.
home.step1Desc: Seenaa du'a keessan PDF ykn DOCX keessatti ba'aa. Sirni keenya PDF, DOCX fudhadha.
home.step2Desc: AI keenya seenaa du'a keessan qora, cimina fi dadhabbii mul'isa, yaada kenna.
home.step3Desc: Yaada hordofaa, seenaa du'a fooyyessaa ba'aa, ciminaan dhiyeessi.
home.ctaSubtitle: Warra seenaa du'a isaanii fooyyessanii hojii abjuu argatanii waliin makaa.

analyze.title: Seenaa Du'a
analyze.subtitle: Seenaa du'a fi ibsaa hojii ba'aa, yaada AI argachuuf
analyze.pasteJobDesc: Ibsaa hojii CV keessan waliin wal qabatu asitti darbaa.
analyze.interviewPrepNote: Gaaffileen ibsaa hojii irratti hundaa'u; gaaffii keessatti mul'atuu danda'u.
analyze.errorUploadAndJob: Mee seenaa du'a ba'aa, ibsaa hojii kenni.
analyze.errorFileType: PDF fi DOCX qofa ni hayyama.

footer.tagline: CVSmart seenaa du'a qorachuuf fi hojii barbaadattoota gaaffii dabalatu argachuuf gargaarsa ta'e kennaaf AI gahaa fayyadama.
